purpose: Same skill, two OpenRouter models, side-by-side ProofResults. Proves the external-validation path (GAP_REVIEW Gate F) and surfaces model-dependent fidelity divergence honestly.
task_prompt: Reuse the skill.replay_fidelity bundle. Run replay twice, once per selected model. Surface both ProofResults and any divergence.

pass_criteria.notes: Two complete ProofResults required. UI MUST display divergence (e.g., model A pass + model B partial) without flattening into a single composite verdict. If both pass at structural fidelity, the fixture passes.
